feat.name: Sap Life
feat.text: You draw the life force out of your enemies. When you cast a *harm* spell and damage at least one living creature, you regain Hit Points equal to the spell rank of your harm spell. If you aren't a living creature, you gain no benefit from this feat.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

traits.name: Healing
traits.text: A healing effect restores a creature’s body, typically by restoring Hit Points, but sometimes by removing diseases or other debilitating effects.
